mission.title: flagger: Skipper Ingress Controller support
mission.description:
fix: #452

## ✨ zalan.do/Skipper Router Implementation

An HTTP router and reverse proxy for service composition, including use cases like Kubernetes Ingress
https://github.com/zalando/skipper/

* The concept is to define routes with specific weights via the skipper specific annotation predicate of `zalando.org/backend-weights`.
* apex Ingress is immutable
* A new "canary ingress" is created with  to paths for primary and canary service that has higher "weight" hence receiving all traffic, which

steps.description:

steps.title: Apply the configuration
steps.description:
Apply the following configuration to your cluster:
```yaml
#!/usr/bin/env bash
REPO_ROOT=$(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)
cd $REPO_ROOT

make test
make build
docker tag weaveworks/flagger:latest test/flagger:latest
make loadtester-build
(kind get clusters && kubectl delete ns/test --force) || kind create cluster --wait 5m --image kindest/node:v1.16.9
./test/e2e-skipper.sh
# port forward prometheus UI to localhost:9090
kubectl port-forward $(kubectl get pods -l=app=flagger-prometheus -o name -n flagger-system | head -n 1) 9090:9090 -n flagger-
```

steps.title: Review the fix
steps.description: The fix was implemented in https://github.com/o11n/flagger/pull/15. Review the changes to understand the solution.

steps.title: Verify the fix
steps.description: Confirm that the issue is resolved in your environment by testing the affected functionality.

resolution.summary:
📝 add documentation about Skipper Ingress

Skipper Ingress Controller support is added with
https://github.com/weaveworks/flagger/pull/670.

This commit add the documentation and links to mention
Skipper is now an available option.

Currently only Canary deployments are supported.
